_provenance: hand-derived from specs/03 §2.3 (linearcodec registration-order typeID assignment + SkipRegistrations); Go extraction deferred to X-cross-cutting
description: Golden typeID table for the test `Iface` interface enum. typeIDs are assigned in Go registration order from 0; SkipRegistrations(7) reserves ids 0..=6, so the first two concrete types land at 7 and 8.
